package.name: armv7_tcp
package.description: Hot-reloadable TCP offset + payload state for armv7. Publishes a tf from link7 (or the EE base) to a configurable `tcp` frame, plus a /armv7/payload topic carrying the current payload mass + inertia. Both are settable via ros2 param at runtime, so swapping a gripper or grabbing a part does not require a relaunch.
package.author: TianFeiF
